items.details: Stakeholder interviews, requirements mapping, and delivery roadmap.
Research synthesis covering three personas and two primary workflows.
Responsive low-fidelity flows for desktop and mobile breakpoints.
Color, typography, spacing, components, and accessible interaction states.
Reusable chart treatments for research dashboards and exported reports.
TypeScript implementation of approved interface components.
Branded cover, executive summary, findings, and appendix templates.
Optimization and accessibility pass for diagrams and iconography.
Keyboard, contrast, screen-reader, and document-output review.
Verification on current Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge releases.
Weekly planning, status reporting, risk tracking, and coordination.
Setup guide, architecture notes, API examples, and release checklist.
Live two-hour implementation walkthrough with recorded Q&A.
Production-readiness review and monitored launch-day support.

paymentTerms: Payment is due within 30 days. Please include the invoice number with your bank transfer.
notes: Thank you for partnering with ACME Studios. Questions about this demo invoice? Contact billing@acme.example.
